parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ltsa_pumps (
  tag_number,
  area,
  location,
  pump_type,
  api_plan,
  seal_type,
  status,
  manufacturer,
  model,
  drawing_ref,
  notes
)
VALUES (
  '{{$json.tag_number}}',
  '{{$json.area}}',
  '{{$json.location}}',
  '{{$json.pump_type}}',
  '{{$json.api_plan}}',
  '{{$json.seal_type}}',
  '{{$json.status}}',
  '{{$json.manufacturer}}',
  '{{$json.model}}',
  '{{$json.drawing_ref}}',
  '{{$json.notes}}'
)
RETURNING *;
